Package com.commercetools.api.models.error

Class ValidityLockConflictErrorBuilder

java.lang.Object
com.commercetools.api.models.error.ValidityLockConflictErrorBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Builder<ValidityLockConflictError>
public class ValidityLockConflictErrorBuilder extends Object implements Builder<ValidityLockConflictError>
ValidityLockConflictErrorBuilder
Example to create an instance using the builder pattern 

     ValidityLockConflictError validityLockConflictError = ValidityLockConflictError.builder()
             .message("{message}")
             .sku("{sku}")
             .currency("{currency}")
             .build()

    • message

      public ValidityLockConflictErrorBuilder message(String message)

      "Modification already in progress for the combination of SKU, price scope fields (but potentially different validity period). Please retry after the current operation completes."

      Parameters:
      message - value to be set
      Returns:
